productDisplayName: Q&Q Unisex Black Digital Stop Watch
description: Style Note  Take a look at the stopwatches from Q& Q that are easy to use with timers and alarms. These stopwatches come with a set of functions that you can use to accurately measure elapsed time.  Product DetailsBlack digital stopwatch with a square case, has a count down timer, time and alarm, three press buttons on top to operate the various functions and a fabric strap looping through a plastic loop which has a movable brand badgeWater resistant to 5 BARSizeCase diameter: 50 mmCase thickness: 15 mm
